chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1534 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6485/2023 (Stay App) 3. For hearing of main case 06.12.2023 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Shar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and submits that the case has been challaned, and the petitioner would avail remedy before the relevant Court. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail proper remedy, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
